title: Operation Earplug
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Operation}} {{Campaign |prev=[[Ugnaught rebellion]][[Star Wars (1977) 57|''Star Wars'' (1977) 57]] |conc= |next=[[Skirmish at Krake Data Vault]][[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]] |image=[[File:Battle_Giels_armada.jpg]] |name=Operation Earplug |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]][[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] |begin= |end= |date=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030626arbra4|series=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm|text=Part 4: Rebels in Disguise}} |place= |result=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] victory *[[Teezl]] destroyed |battles=*[[Mission to Bazarre|Mission to ''Bazarre'']][[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] *[[Skirmish on Spindrift]][[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' (1977) 60]] *[[Battle of the secret armada]] |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]] |commanders2=[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |forces1=*[[Secret armada]] **1 Teezl |forces2=[[Flying Bantha Squadron]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Several ships destroyed *Teezl |casual2=*Two refitted [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] *[[Alph (Rogue)|Alph]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Though the teezl is nonsentient, nonfeeling, perhaps not even intelligent, it is alive. And for the glory of the Empire—not to mention the continuation of my own career—I fully intend to keep it that way!|Mils Giel|}} '''Operation Earplug''' was the codename used for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] military operation designed to end the potential threat of the [[teezl]], an organic [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] communications amplifier that had been discovered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. With both sides certain that the teezl's installation in the Imperial war machine would be a decisive blow in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Empire entrusted [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]] to command a [[secret armada]] to shepherd the creature to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. However, Rebel [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Flying Bantha Squadron]], flying disguised and refitted Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]], infiltrated the armada and destroyed the teezl, along with much of Giel's [[Helmsman (battlecruiser)|flagship]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|Don't worry, Luke. We've still got the Force on our side—not to mention the best darned flight commander in the galaxy!"
"Thanks, Shira, but if that secret armada we've heard the Empire is building is for real, we'll need a lot more than that.|Luke Skywalker and Shira Brie|}} [[File:Teezl.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The teezl, the target of Operation Earplug.]] In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Imperial scouts operating in the [[Valtha Divide/Legends|Valtha Divide]] discovered a most unusual creature.''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' The [[teezl]], thought to be the only one of its kind, had considerable abilities as a natural [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] communicator, able to transmit information instantly to any receptor in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Seeing the teezl's natural talents as potentially a game-changer in the intensifying war with the Alliance, the Empire constructed a [[secret armada]]—then the largest in Imperial history—under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]] to transport the creature to the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Corsucant]]. However, the Rebels caught wind of the teezl's existence, and soon formed plans of their own. Fearing that the teezl's installation at the heart of the Imperial war machine would mean certain defeat, the Alliance formed a small task force in order to make sure the teezl never made it to Coruscant. ==The operation== {{Quote|The radio's out! And worse, the transceiver's being jammed! I can't tell which TIEs are friendly! But I don't have any choice! I've got to keep the Empire from using that screamer against the Alliance! And I can't let defective equipment—or enemy guns—or anything else stop me!|Luke Skywalker|}} The Rebel plan to disrupt the teezl's delivery—dubbed "Operation Earplug"—relied heavily on subterfuge and confusion, and required the acquisition of four Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE starfighters]] to infiltrate Giel's armada. This was accomplished through a deal with underworld arms dealer [[Orion Ferret]], who offered the Alliance four TIE [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] he had reconstructed out of parts purchased from battlefield scavengers. The mission almost went awry before it started, as Ferret double-crossed Rebel [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and compatriots [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] when they arrived on the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] ''[[Bazarre]]'' to execute the transaction, and Skywalker and Calrissian were left to die on the garbage [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Patch-4]]. However, the Rebels emerged from the betrayal intact and with the TIE fighters secured, returning to the main [[Haven Base|Rebel base]] on the planet [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]]. [[File:Flagship_explode.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The teezl's transport cage is destroyed, ensuring Alliance success.]] With the four starfighters fully operational and modified with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] with limited output but much higher firepower, a complement of [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] from the elite [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' was formed to carry out the destruction of the teezl—this "[[Flying Bantha Squadron]]" was composed of Commander Skywalker, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]], [[Alph (Rogue)|Alph]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hanc Thorben]], who had overseen the TIEs' refitting. A successful [[Skirmish on Spindrift|sortie]] on the isolated Imperial outpost of [[Spindrift]] not only proved that the reconstructed TIEs could pass for the real thing, but provided the armada's route coordinates. Flying Bantha Squadron soon acquired a set of codes to acquire entrance to the armada's formation after capturing and interrogating an Imperial [[Milnn|pilot]], and the stage was set. After maneuvering their way within the caravan of Imperial ships, the Flying Banthas attacked, confusing the Imperial forces who could not pick out where the laserfire was coming from. Amidst the Rebels' opening salvos, an Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] commander named [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Voss (Imperial officer)|Voss]] ordered his men to attack indiscriminately, plunging the armada into complete chaos. Matters only escalated when Admiral Giel ordered the teezl to jam the Rebels' communications, forcing Skywalker and the others to fly blind. Still, Skywalker leaned on his connection to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to reach Giel's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]—the [[Praetor Mark II-class battlecruiser|''Praetor Mark II''-class battlecruiser]] ''[[Helmsman (battlecruiser)|Helmsman]]''—and used his final high-powered laser blast to annihilate the teezl's transport cage and take much of Giel's ship with it. Skywalker then narrowly evaded Imperial pursuit to make the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], winning the day for the Alliance. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Say, isn't that the last fighter I tagged? The one near the flagship?"
"It is. Freeze that image, Captain, and bring up the magnification."
"Look, I still don't—wait a minute! That pilot's wearing Rebel gear! It's—oh, no! No! I-it couldn't be! Shira!|Luke Skywalker and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], after Skywalker's return from Operation Earplug|}} [[File:MissionAccomplished.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Luke Skywalker learns that he had apparently killed Shira Brie during the operation.]] Their mission to destroy the teezl successful, two of the "Flying Banthas" made it home to Arbra: Skywalker and Thorben. However, Skywalker discovered no heroes' welcome waiting for him—instead, he learned that one of the TIEs he had shot down during the battle had contained his squadmate, Lieutenant Brie. Skywalker was briefly disgraced and stripped of his commission in the aftermath of Brie's apparent death,[[Star Wars (1977) 62|''Star Wars'' (1977) 62]] but had his status restored after a [[Skirmish at Krake Data Vault|mission]] to [[Krake Data Vault]] revealed that Brie had actually been an Imperial double agent. The two surviving modified TIEs used in Operation Earplug remained in rebel hands and continued to see active service for years afterward—[[New Republic Intelligence]] would later use the fighters for fact-finding missions into the Empire after the rebels' [[Battle of Endor/Legends|climactic victory]] at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. ==Behind the scenes== Operation Earplug occurred over the course of several [[1982]] issues of the original [[Marvel Comics]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] comic book run, with the arc being written by [[David Michelinie]] and illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]]. The name "Operation Earplug" was later given in [[2003]], in [[Cory J. Herndon]]'s [[Wizards of the Coast]] article ''[[Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm]]''. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 58}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 59}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' (1977) 60]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 60}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 61}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 62|''Star Wars'' (1977) 62]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 62}} {{Imo}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 63}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030626arbra4|series=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm|text=Part 4: Rebels in Disguise}} {{1stID|Operation Earplug}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GalacCivilWarcampaigns}} [[Category:Galactic Civil War campaigns]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Battles of Operation Earplug]] }}
